user.title: Smart Vent Controller Setup
user.description: Select the HVAC thermostat for this zone. You can configure multiple thermostats by adding this integration multiple times.{migration_note}

migrate.title: Migrate from YAML
migrate.description:
Found YAML configuration with {rooms_count} rooms and thermostat {main_thermostat}.

Warnings:
{warnings}

Do you want to import this configuration?

rooms.title: Configure Rooms
rooms.description: Add rooms to control. You can add multiple rooms.

data_description.name: A friendly name for this room (e.g. "Master Bedroom")
data_description.climate_entity: Optional external climate entity for this room's setpoint. If omitted, the integration manages the setpoint.
data_description.temp_sensor: Optional dedicated temperature sensor for more accurate readings
data_description.occupancy_sensor: Optional binary sensor that indicates room occupancy
data_description.vent_entities: One or more smart vent cover entities in this room
data_description.priority: Higher priority rooms are conditioned first and relieved last (0–10)

settings_intro.title: Settings
settings_intro.description: You can customize algorithm, temperature, HVAC, and automation settings, or use the recommended defaults. You can always adjust settings later from the integration options.

data_description.use_defaults: Enable to skip detailed configuration and use sensible defaults. You can adjust settings later from the integration options.

settings_algorithm.title: Algorithm & Vent Positioning (1/4)
settings_algorithm.description: Configure how vent positions are calculated and balanced across rooms.

data_description.control_strategy: Simple uses fixed positions, Learned adapts from past cycles, Hybrid blends both
data_description.vent_granularity: Round vent positions to the nearest increment (e.g. 5 rounds to 0/5/10/…/100)
data_description.min_other_room_open_pct: Minimum open percentage for vents in non-target rooms to maintain airflow
data_description.closed_threshold_pct: Vents at or below this percentage are treated as fully closed
data_description.relief_open_pct: How far to open relief vents to maintain system back-pressure
data_description.max_relief_rooms: Maximum number of rooms that can act as relief vents at once
data_description.conventional_vent_count: Number of non-smart (always-open) vents in the system for airflow math

settings_temperature.title: Temperature & Setpoint Control (2/4)
settings_temperature.description: Adjust temperature thresholds, hysteresis, and heat boost behavior.

data_description.room_hysteresis_f: Dead band around the setpoint before a room is considered satisfied
data_description.heat_boost_f: Extra degrees added to the thermostat setpoint during heating cycles
data_description.default_thermostat_temp: Fallback thermostat setpoint when no room needs conditioning
data_description.temp_error_override_f: Override the throttle interval when temperature error exceeds this

settings_hvac.title: HVAC Protection & Timing (3/4)
settings_hvac.description: Set polling intervals, adjustment throttles, and short-cycle protection.

data_description.min_adjustment_pct: Ignore vent changes smaller than this to reduce motor wear
data_description.min_adjustment_interval_min: Minimum time between vent position changes for a room
data_description.hvac_min_runtime_min: Minimum HVAC run time before allowing a shutdown (short-cycle protection)
data_description.hvac_min_off_time_min: Minimum HVAC off time before allowing a restart (short-cycle protection)
data_description.poll_interval_active_sec: How often to poll sensors while the HVAC is actively running
data_description.poll_interval_idle_sec: How often to poll sensors while the HVAC is idle
data_description.automation_cooldown_sec: Minimum time between automation triggers to prevent rapid toggling

settings_behavior.title: Occupancy & Automation (4/4)
settings_behavior.description: Control occupancy behavior, feature toggles, and debug logging.

data_description.occupancy_linger_min: Keep conditioning a room for this long after occupancy clears (daytime)
data_description.occupancy_linger_night_min: Keep conditioning a room for this long after occupancy clears (nighttime)
data_description.require_occupancy: Only condition rooms that currently show occupancy
data_description.heat_boost_enabled: Add extra degrees to the setpoint during heating for faster warm-up
data_description.auto_thermostat_control: Let the integration adjust the thermostat setpoint automatically
data_description.auto_vent_control: Let the integration open and close vents automatically

reconfigure.title: Manage Rooms
reconfigure.description:
You have {room_count} room(s) configured: {room_names}.

Choose an action below.

data_description.name: A friendly name for this room (e.g. "Master Bedroom")
data_description.climate_entity: Optional external climate entity for this room's setpoint. If omitted, the integration manages the setpoint.
data_description.temp_sensor: Optional dedicated temperature sensor for more accurate readings
data_description.occupancy_sensor: Optional binary sensor that indicates room occupancy
data_description.vent_entities: One or more smart vent cover entities in this room
data_description.priority: Higher priority rooms are conditioned first and relieved last (0–10)

data_description.name: A friendly name for this room (e.g. "Master Bedroom")
data_description.climate_entity: Optional external climate entity for this room's setpoint. If omitted, the integration manages the setpoint.
data_description.temp_sensor: Optional dedicated temperature sensor for more accurate readings
data_description.occupancy_sensor: Optional binary sensor that indicates room occupancy
data_description.vent_entities: One or more smart vent cover entities in this room
data_description.priority: Higher priority rooms are conditioned first and relieved last (0–10)

confirm_remove.title: Confirm Removal
confirm_remove.description: Are you sure you want to remove **{room_name}**? This will delete all associated sensors and devices.

error.no_climate_entities: No climate entities found. Please add a climate entity first.
error.no_rooms: At least one room must be configured
error.duplicate_room_name: A room with this name already exists

init.title: Smart Vent Controller Options
init.description: Select a category to configure. Changes take effect immediately.
